## What

Brief description of the changes.

## Why

Motivation and context. Link to any related issues (e.g., `Closes #123`).

## How

Summary of the approach taken.

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`go test ./... -v -race`)
- [ ] Linter passes (`golangci-lint run`)
- [ ] Both binaries build (`go build ./cmd/dashboard && go build ./cmd/agent`)
- [ ] Code is formatted (`gofmt` + `goimports`)
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)
- [ ] No new third-party dependencies added (or discussed in an issue first)
